tasks.subject: Task 0: Rewrite internal/llm/client.go for OpenAI chat completions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-implement internal/llm/client.go against OpenAI's chat/completions endpoint while keeping the public Go interface (NewClient, Available, Model, Complete) byte-identical so callers in internal/mcp/optimize.go need zero changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/llm/client.go
- Create: internal/llm/client_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/llm/... ./internal/mcp/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/llm/client.go", "internal/llm/client_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/llm/... ./internal/mcp/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Public API (NewClient/Available/Model/Complete) signatures unchanged", "Default model = gpt-4o-mini", "Auth header is Authorization: Bearer", "System+user sent as two messages", "Response parsed from choices[0].message.content", "Token usage parsed from usage.prompt_tokens/completion_tokens", "OpenAI error envelope handled", "httptest fixture asserts request shape", "go vet + go test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Production env var rotation note
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the production deploy requirement so the LLM swap doesn't ship with a key that no longer works.

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-30-arc-relay-skill-update-checker.md (append Deploy notes appendix)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-30-arc-relay-skill-update-checker.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Deploy notes appendix exists", "Covers OpenAI key provisioning, Komodo secret update, redeploy command, smoke test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migration 017_skill_upstreams.sql
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the skill_upstreams table and skills.outdated column. Purely additive.

**Files:**
- Create: migrations/017_skill_upstreams.sql

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/store/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/017_skill_upstreams.sql"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/store/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["skill_upstreams.skill_id PK + FK to skills(id) ON DELETE CASCADE", "skills.outdated column DEFAULT 0", "drift_severity CHECK constraint enforces enum or NULL", "go test ./internal/store/... passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SkillStore upstream + drift methods
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Go-level types and store methods for managing skill_upstreams.

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/store/skills.go
- Modify: internal/store/skills_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/store/ -run "Upstream|Drift" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/store/skills.go", "internal/store/skills_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/store/ -run \"Upstream|Drift\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SkillUpstream + DriftReport types defined", "UpsertUpstream/GetUpstream/ClearUpstream/ListUpstreams methods", "WriteDriftReport flips skills.outdated=1 in same tx", "ClearDriftReport NULLs drift_* + flips outdated=0 in same tx", "UpdateUpstreamCheck for no-drift cron path", "Skill.Outdated field added; GetSkill/ListSkills SELECTs updated", "Tests cover happy path + missing-row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Push handler accepts upstream metadata + clears drift
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend uploadVersion in internal/web/skills_handlers.go to accept optional upstream JSON form field and clear_upstream boolean. Always clear drift fields on successful push for skills with an upstream row.

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/web/skills_handlers.go
- Modify or create: internal/web/skills_handlers_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/web/ -run "Skill.*[Uu]pload|Skill.*[Pp]ush|Upstream" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/skills_handlers.go", "internal/web/skills_handlers_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/web/ -run \"Skill.*[Uu]pload|Skill.*[Pp]ush|Upstream\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Handler reads optional 'upstream' (JSON) and 'clear_upstream' (bool) form fields", "upstream JSON UPSERTs SkillStore row; clear_upstream=true DELETEs row", "Both absent leaves existing row untouched", "On any successful push, ClearDriftReport called if upstream row exists (placeholder hash for now; Task 11 wires real hash)", "Response JSON gains upstream_recorded boolean", "Tests cover all three side-effect cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Deterministic subtree hash function
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the spec's subtree-hash algorithm in a new internal/skills/subhash package.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/skills/subhash/hash.go
- Create: internal/skills/subhash/hash_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/subhash/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/subhash/hash.go", "internal/skills/subhash/hash_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/subhash/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["func Hash(rootDir string) (string, error) returns hex SHA256", "Sorted file walk", "Skips .git/, .DS_Store, .gitignore-matched entries", "Per-file emit: relpath\\nmode-octal\\ncontent\\n", "Modes: 0o100644/0o100755/0o120000", "Streams content via io.Copy", "Tests cover empty/single/sorted/exec/symlink/gitignore/.git/identity/diff"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Sidecar TOML parser + CLI push integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parse .arc-sync/upstream.toml during arc-sync skill push; CLI flags override; send metadata as multipart upstream field.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/cli/sync/upstream.go
- Create: internal/cli/sync/upstream_test.go
- Modify: internal/cli/sync/skills.go
- Modify: cmd/arc-sync/skill.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/cli/sync/ -run "Upstream|Push" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/cli/sync/upstream.go", "internal/cli/sync/upstream_test.go", "internal/cli/sync/skills.go", "cmd/arc-sync/skill.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/cli/sync/ -run \"Upstream|Push\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LoadUpstream(skillDir) returns nil for missing file", "WithOverrides applies CLI flag overrides", "--no-upstream sends clear_upstream=true", "Push request includes multipart 'upstream' JSON when metadata present", "Tests cover missing/malformed/merge/no-upstream"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Git fetch helper with cache dir lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap exec.Command("git", ...) with clone-once-then-fetch lifecycle and corruption recovery.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/skills/checker/git.go
- Create: internal/skills/checker/git_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run "Ensure|Resolve|LogPath" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/checker/git.go", "internal/skills/checker/git_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run \"Ensure|Resolve|LogPath\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EnsureCache: clone fresh, fetch existing, re-clone on corruption", "ResolveSHA returns trimmed git rev-parse output", "LogPath returns lines from git log <from>..<to> -- <subpath> --oneline", "CheckoutSubpath extracts subpath at SHA into destDir", "All accept ctx for cancellation", "Tests use t.TempDir() git repos, no network"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Two-stage detection function
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compose EnsureCache + ResolveSHA + LogPath + subhash.Hash into Detect() returning the four-outcome Detection struct.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/skills/checker/detect.go
- Create: internal/skills/checker/detect_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run "Detect" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/checker/detect.go", "internal/skills/checker/detect_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run \"Detect\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Detection enum: NoMovement/NoPathTouch/RevertedToSame/Drift", "Detect() implements three skip paths in order", "On Drift: populates ChangedFiles + truncated DiffSummary", "Tests cover all four outcomes via fixture repos"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Cron + Prometheus metrics + main wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop the daily cron alongside extractor.RunCron; introduce minimal SkillsCheckerConfig (Task 15 will expand).

**Files:**
- Create: internal/skills/checker/cron.go
- Create: internal/skills/checker/metrics.go
- Create: internal/skills/checker/service.go
- Modify: cmd/arc-relay/main.go
- Modify: internal/config/config.go (introduce minimal SkillsCheckerConfig — Task 15 expands)

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -v && go build ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/checker/cron.go", "internal/skills/checker/metrics.go", "internal/skills/checker/service.go", "cmd/arc-relay/main.go", "internal/config/config.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -v && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Service struct holds skills/llm/cfg", "RunCron matches extractor.RunCron pattern", "RunOnce(ctx) does one full pass; usable from cron and HTTP endpoint", "checkOne handles 4 detection outcomes; placeholder severity=unknown for Drift (Task 11 fills)", "Prometheus counters arc_relay_skill_checks_total + duration histogram registered", "main.go starts the goroutine after extractor cron", "Integration test seeds skill+upstream+fixture repo and asserts row update"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: LLM classifier + fallback synthesis
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build Classify(ctx, llm, skill, det) returning a DriftReport. LLM path uses structured JSON; fallback synthesizes from changed-files + git log.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/skills/checker/llm.go
- Create: internal/skills/checker/llm_test.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run "Classify|Fallback" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/checker/llm.go", "internal/skills/checker/llm_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/skills/checker/... -run \"Classify|Fallback\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Prompt matches spec sketch", "Parsed response validates severity/summary/recommended_action", "Invalid JSON falls back, doesn't error the cron", "Fallback summary uses git log --oneline output and severity=unknown", "Tests use httptest stub of OpenAI + no-LLM path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Wire LLM into checker; persist drift fields + real hash on push
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder writes in checkOne with real Classify() call. Compute real subtree hash from uploaded tarball during push and pass to ClearDriftReport.

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/skills/checker/service.go
- Modify: internal/web/skills_handlers.go
- Modify: internal/skills/service.go (add tarball-extract-and-hash helper)

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./... -run "Drift|Checker" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/skills/checker/service.go", "internal/web/skills_handlers.go", "internal/skills/service.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./... -run \"Drift|Checker\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["checkOne flows through Classify", "Push computes real subtree hash before ClearDriftReport", "Integration test: push -> cron -> drift detected -> report written, with stubbed OpenAI", "No-LLM-key integration test: same flow, fallback severity=unknown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: POST /api/skills/<slug>/check-drift endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On-demand HTTP endpoint, admin-only, calls checker.Service.RunOneSlug.

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/web/skills_handlers.go
- Modify: internal/server/http.go

**Verify:** CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/web/ -run "CheckDrift" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/skills_handlers.go", "internal/server/http.go"], "verifyCommand": "CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 -count=1 ./internal/web/ -run \"CheckDrift\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Admin-only POST /api/skills/<slug>/check-drift", "200 with drift JSON, 204 no drift, 404 unknown, 409 no upstream, 502 fetch fail", "60s timeout", "Tests for each status code"]}
```

